jupyter_packaging
=================

# Available modules


The overview below shows which jupyter_packaging installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using jupyter_packaging, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load jupyter_packaging/0.12.3-GCCcore-13.2.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
